message:
fix: prevent UTF-8 truncation panic, correct activity offset encoding, and always update updated_at

Replace raw string truncation in event identity normalization with
truncate_to_char_boundary to avoid panicking when a multi-byte
character straddles the cut point. Add tests confirming multi-byte
extracted values hash correctly.

Fix the activity tracker offset encoding to use max(1, offset) so
that a genuine zero-offset activity is stored as 1 and decoded back
to epoch, distinguishing "never recorded" (0) from "recorded at
epoch" (1→0). Add a decode round-trip test.

Fix touch_last_applied in both config_profiles and rulesets to
always overwrite updated_at instead of preserving a stale value via
.or() — the previous behavior meant re-applying a profile would
never advance the updated_at timestamp. Add tests for both modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
